mapper.sql: address_id, user_name, real_name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into tb_address (user_name, real_name, phone, province, city, district, detail, is_default, create_time, update_time) values (#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{detail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select:
select
from tb_address where user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by is_default desc, create_time desc
mapper.update: update tb_address set is_default = 0 where user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
